subject: [PATCH v2 08/28] nfsd: check fl_lmops in nfsd_breaker_owns_lease()

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a quick check to the nfsd_breaker_owns_lease() function to verify that the lease being checked is an nfsd lease by checking if its fl_lmops field matches the nfsd_lease_mng_ops structure. This simplifies the function and improves performance by avoiding unnecessary checks for leases not created by nfsd.
